Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First, I need to understand the existing model. The given declare_model has existence constraints for StartApplication and FinalDecision. Init is StartApplication. Coexistence between StartApplication and FinalDecision. Response from StartApplication to RequestAdditionalInfo. Succession from RequestAdditionalInfo to FinalDecision.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But the problem is that there might be bias. For example, if FinalDecision is Reject, it might be happening right after checking sensitive attributes without proper checks. So I need to add constraints to mitigate that.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So first, we need to add existence constraints for CheckApplicantRace and ManualReview. Then, add coexistence between CheckApplicantRace and ManualReview. Non-succession between CheckApplicantRace and FinalDecision. Precedence ManualReview FinalDecision.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For binary constraints, the dictionary maps an activity to another activitys dictionary. For response A B stored as A: B. For precedence A B since precedence A B means B requires A before stored as B: A in precedence.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: This is a critical point. Need to get the direction right. Wait precedence A B is defined as for every B there must be A before. So in dictionary under precedence B: A.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Does this cover the bias mitigation. If CheckApplicantRace is in the trace then ManualReview must coexist and must occur after CheckApplicantRace response and FinalDecision must have ManualReview before it precedence and CheckApplicantRace cannot be immediately followed by FinalDecision nonsuccession.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: To keep it simple focus on ApplicantRace as an example.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Updated model adds to existence CheckApplicantRace and ManualReview. To coexistence CheckApplicantRace ManualReview. To response CheckApplicantRace ManualReview. To precedence FinalDecision ManualReview. To nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace FinalDecision.
